description: The initial stage where incoming roster files are validated for structural integrity, correct formatting, and basic data types. Failed files may be halted (STOPPED) before reaching mapping.
Stage where the payer's standard schema is mapped to the provider's custom data format. Requires approval from data stewards.
Intermediate Standard Format Generation. Converts the proprietary provider data into the master internal format.
Data Analysis & Review Tool Generation. Creates the dataset that operational teams will review for data quality and anomalies.
Manual or automated review of the DART dataset to identify critical data quality issues before pushing to production.
Validation checks specifically targeting the UI presentation of the roster data.
The final load into the downstream Source Provider System (SPS). This is the operational system of record.
Numeric status indicating where a Roster Operation is. 9=Stopped, 45=DART Review, 49=DART Generation, 99=Resolved.
STOPPED status for a roster file.
DART_REVIEW status for a roster file.
DART_GENERATION status for a roster file.
RESOLVED status for a roster file. The process has concluded successfully.
Indicates the pipeline stage or processing step completed within expected parameters and historical timeframes.
Indicates a warning: the pipeline stage took longer than average or encountered non-critical warnings but did not fail.
Indicates a critical error or severe delay: a pipeline stage has exceeded acceptable duration thresholds or encountered failures.
A boolean indicating if the RO is currently stuck in its latest stage and not moving forward. Usually correlated with high stage duration.
A boolean indicating that the RO encountered a terminal error and cannot be processed further without intervention.
The overall transaction success rate percentage for a market and month. Shows the ratio of successful transactions to total transactions.
The processing iteration. 1 = initial run, >1 = reprocessing attempt (retry lift). A higher run number indicates previous failures were retried.
Medicare Health Maintenance Organization Line of Business.
Medicaid Fee-For-Service Line of Business.
Commercial Preferred Provider Organization / Exclusive Provider Organization Line of Business.
Provider Data Management system by Availity.
A failure state indicating that the roster records completely failed internal business rules and data quality validation.
